overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a dark, neon-lit corporate corridor in a futuristic cyberpunk building. The camera moves steadily forward past planters and benches, initially overlooking a multi-level atrium with red lighting, then approaches an elevator door passing a prominent 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' billboard. Cyberpunk 2077 game engine footage featuring high-contrast red and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated corporate walkway overlooking multi-level atrium

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor with a view of the red-lit atrium structure to the left

entered.detail: multi-level interior structure with red ambient lighting visible through glass walls
vertical red neon light strips lining the atrium floors
rectangular planter with dense green foliage in the center of the walkway
modern white bench along the right railing
large white number 10 painted on the dark wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sleek corporate walkway with polished floors, lined with white benches and central planters. To the left, a dramatic multi-level atrium glows with red neon lighting through glass panels, while the camera moves steadily forward through the quiet, empty corridor.

events.description: multi-level atrium view recedes as corridor walls close in, secure your soul billboard comes into view on left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward the elevator door at the end, passing the illuminated billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated wall advertisement with text SECURE YOUR SOUL and corporate logo
double metal doors with cyan neon frame at the end of the corridor
low red neon light strips embedded in the floor along the right side
bright cyan rectangular ceiling light fixture

segments.scene_description: The atrium view disappears as the corridor narrows, revealing a prominent 'SECURE YOUR SOUL' billboard on the left wall. The camera approaches a metal elevator door framed in cyan neon at the corridor's end, passing red floor lights and under bright overhead fixtures.

events.description: corridor lighting dims significantly as camera moves past the main overhead fixtures into darker zone

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal elevator door at the end of the increasingly dark corridor

entered.detail: cyan neon light frame surrounding the elevator door

segments.scene_description: The corridor grows darker as the camera moves past the billboard and planters, with only the red floor lights and the cyan neon door frame illuminating the path. The segment ends as the camera approaches the metal elevator door at the corridor's terminus.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sleek corporate corridor that shifts from an open, red-lit atrium view to a narrow, dimly lit approach toward a secure elevator. It begins on a polished walkway lined with white benches and central planters, moving steadily past a dramatic multi-level atrium glowing with red neon through glass panels. As the camera advances, the atrium view disappears and the corridor narrows, revealing a prominent SECURE YOUR SOUL billboard on the left wall. The scene then grows darker, with the lighting shifting from bright overhead fixtures to a contrast of red floor lights and a cyan neon frame. Finally, the camera glides past the remaining planters to reach the metal elevator door at the corridor's terminus.
